## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What limitation or pain point does this solve?

## Proposed Approach

Describe the desired API, behavior, or workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives you evaluated.

## Additional Context

Add examples, links, or prior art if useful.
